title: Add delete option for uploads in main feed with permanent removal and per-user authorization

requirements.text: Ensure the main feed shows a delete action for uploads that belong to the currently authenticated user, including the existing backend-upload item titled "test".

quotes: I see no option to delete an upload. This is imperative for all uploads. But let's just remove the last manually uploaded test upload. It's only 7 seconds.
In the main feed. It's labelled "test".
There should be a delete-upload feature.

acceptanceCriteria: When signed in, backend items in the main feed that are authored by the signed-in principal display a visible delete option (e.g., in a post menu)
The backend-upload post titled "test" in the main feed displays the delete option for its author
When not signed in, no delete option is shown in the main feed for backend uploads

requirements.text: Implement deletion for feed items so that deleting a published backend upload permanently removes the post and its associated stored audio blob, and deleting a draft upload permanently removes it from local device storage.

quotes: Permanently remove the upload from storage

acceptanceCriteria: Deleting a backend upload removes it from the feed and from subsequent calls that load the user’s backend content (e.g., the item no longer appears after refresh)
Deleting a backend upload also deletes the underlying stored audio data so it is no longer retrievable via backend blob access for that post
Deleting a draft upload removes it from the feed and from localStorage so it does not reappear after refresh

requirements.text: Enforce that only the uploader/author can delete their own published backend uploads (UI gating + backend authorization).
acceptanceCriteria: Backend rejects delete attempts from non-authors with an authorization error
Frontend does not show a delete option on published uploads unless the signed-in user is the author
If a non-author still attempts deletion (e.g., via manual calls), the UI shows an English error message indicating the user can only delete their own posts

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui (compose instead).
Do not introduce additional backend services; keep all backend logic in the single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo).
Do not change unrelated app behavior or UI beyond adding/fixing the delete-upload option in the main feed ("Don't change anything else").
nonGoals: Add admin/moderator deletion of other users’ uploads
Add new social features (likes/comments) related to deletion
